requirement_topic.en: OCPP, Remote Operations, and EMC / Power Quality
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP、远程运营及EMC / 电能质量
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP、遠程營運及EMC / 電能質量

summary.en: No Mauritania public national OCPP mandate for EV chargers was confirmed as of 2026-06-14. For networked public or fleet chargers, OCPP is nevertheless the practical international baseline for charge-point management, remote monitoring, fault reporting, access control, billing support, and load management. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared against IEC 61000-family requirements and any SOMELEC or project-specific harmonic and disturbance limits. In weak-grid areas, remote diagnostics and load control may be more important than in mature EV markets because outages, voltage instability, and maintenance travel time can dominate operating risk.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，尚未确认毛里塔尼亚公开的国家级充电桩OCPP强制要求。对于联网公共或车队充电桩，OCPP仍是充电点管理、远程监控、故障报告、访问控制、计费支持和负载管理的实务国际基线。EMC和电能质量证据应按IEC 61000系列要求及任何SOMELEC或项目专属谐波和扰动限值准备。在弱电网地区，远程诊断和负载控制可能比成熟电动汽车市场更重要，因为停电、电压不稳定和维护路程时间会成为主要运营风险。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，尚未確認茅利塔尼亞公開的國家級充電樁OCPP強制要求。對於聯網公共或車隊充電樁，OCPP仍是充電點管理、遠程監控、故障報告、訪問控制、計費支持和負載管理的實務國際基線。EMC和電能質量證據應按IEC 61000系列要求及任何SOMELEC或項目專屬諧波和擾動限值準備。在弱電網地區，遠程診斷和負載控制可能比成熟電動汽車市場更重要，因為停電、電壓不穩定和維護路程時間會成為主要營運風險。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility, emissions, immunity, harmonics, and flicker
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
SOMELEC project-specific power-quality and metering requirements (verify current procedure)

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 between the off-board charger and the vehicle battery management system. GB/T 27930 is a charger-to-vehicle CAN protocol and is not a substitute for OCPP back-office communication. China AC or DC chargers may support operator-specific platforms or OCPP variants, but the supported OCPP version, security profile, SIM / Ethernet connectivity, language settings, and meter data model must be confirmed for the Mauritania operator or project owner.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常在非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间使用GB/T 27930-2023。GB/T 27930是桩车CAN协议，不能替代OCPP后台通信。中国交流或直流充电桩可能支持运营商专属平台或OCPP版本，但必须为毛里塔尼亚运营方或项目业主确认支持的OCPP版本、安全配置、SIM / 以太网连接、语言设置和电表数据模型。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常在非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間使用GB/T 27930-2023。GB/T 27930是樁車CAN協議，不能替代OCPP後台通訊。中國交流或直流充電樁可能支持營運商專屬平台或OCPP版本，但必須為茅利塔尼亞營運方或項目業主確認支持的OCPP版本、安全配置、SIM / 以太網連接、語言設置和電表數據模型。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China EMC and power-quality test standards used for domestic charger approval

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the OCPP version and security profile required by the buyer, whether local cellular coverage is adequate at the charging site, whether French or Arabic operator interfaces are needed, how billing and access control are handled, and whether remote power limiting is required to protect a weak feeder. EMC evidence should include conducted and radiated emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker, surge, electrostatic discharge, and power-quality behavior under voltage variation. GB/T 27930 alone does not provide back-office interoperability.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认买方要求的OCPP版本和安全配置、充电场站本地蜂窝网络覆盖是否足够、是否需要法文或阿拉伯文运营界面、计费和访问控制如何处理，以及是否需要远程限功率以保护弱馈线。EMC证据应包括传导和辐射发射、抗扰度、谐波、闪变、浪涌、静电放电以及电压波动下的电能质量表现。单独的GB/T 27930不能提供后台互操作。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認買方要求的OCPP版本和安全配置、充電場站本地蜂窩網絡覆蓋是否足夠、是否需要法文或阿拉伯文營運界面、計費和訪問控制如何處理，以及是否需要遠程限功率以保護弱饋線。EMC證據應包括傳導和輻射發射、抗擾度、諧波、閃變、浪湧、靜電放電以及電壓波動下的電能質量表現。單獨的GB/T 27930不能提供後台互操作。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by project owner, CPO, fleet operator, donor specification, ARE/SOMELEC approval, metering arrangement, or public charging operation; nationwide Mauritania OCPP mandate unconfirmed as of 2026-06-14
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is a China domestic DC charger-to-vehicle protocol and is not an OCPP or EMC compliance substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Mauritania, OCPP should be treated as an operational requirement whenever chargers are public, networked, or remotely maintained. Pair OCPP checks with IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence because weak-grid operation can be the limiting factor.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在毛里塔尼亚，只要充电桩为公共、联网或远程维护，应将OCPP视为运营要求。OCPP检查应与IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量证据配套，因为弱电网运行可能成为限制因素。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在茅利塔尼亞，只要充電樁為公共、聯網或遠程維護，應將OCPP視為營運要求。OCPP檢查應與IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量證據配套，因為弱電網運行可能成為限制因素。
